checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
CAPTCHA detected: recaptcha, captcha
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt blocks AI bots: gptbot, chatgpt, anthropic, claude, google-extended, ccbot
robots.txt references a sitemap
No sitemap.xml found
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
Found 2 JSON-LD blocks: WebSite, NewsMediaOrganization
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 2708 divs with only 208 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 98/171 interactive elements have labels
No form inputs found
Found 106 elements with stable test selectors
Likely a client-side SPA — minimal server-rendered content
Multiple h1 headings (2) — ambiguous page title
6 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 112/118 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Proper 405 with Allow header: GET, HEAD

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~363,120 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 0% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 3 — clean structure
Reading this page costs $0.45–$5.45 per load ($2.27–$27.23 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation
6/43 images missing alt text — agents can't understand these images
Found 3 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
Found 2 live region(s) — agents can detect dynamic content changes
3 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
14 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 197ms
Large payload: 1452KB — increases token cost for agents
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Resource heavy: 14 scripts, 45 stylesheets
Compression enabled: gzip
